sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n99538" key="sunasbolo/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνασβολόω</orth>, <sense id="n99538.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">blacken with soot</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πάντα</quote_> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Epic.Alex.Adesp.inc.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1589.tlg001:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
